corporate_income_tax.label: IRES — Imposta sul Reddito delle Società 2025
corporate_income_tax.notes: IRES 24% flat on net taxable income. See D.P.R. 917/1986 art. 77.

regional_production_tax.label: IRAP — Imposta Regionale sulle Attività Produttive 2025
regional_production_tax.notes: IRAP 3.9% standard rate. Regions may apply ±0.92pp. Base = value of production minus eligible costs (no interest, no personnel generally). D.Lgs. 446/1997.

vat.label: IVA — Imposta sul Valore Aggiunto 2025
vat.notes: 22% standard; 10% reduced (food, tourism, medicines); 5% (social cooperatives); 4% super-reduced (essential goods, books); 0% exports.

income_tax.label: IRPEF — Imposta sul Reddito delle Persone Fisiche 2025
income_tax.notes: 3-bracket structure from Legge di Bilancio 2025. Top marginal rate 43%.

withholding_tax_dividends.label: Ritenuta dividendi (dividend withholding tax) 2025
withholding_tax_dividends.notes: 26% ritenuta a titolo d'imposta on dividends paid to individuals. PEX (participation exemption) 95% for qualifying corporate holdings.

regime_forfettario.label: Regime forfettario (flat tax for small businesses/freelancers)
regime_forfettario.notes: Available to individuals with turnover ≤ EUR 85,000. Substitute tax at 15% (5% for first 5 years for new activities). No IVA charged/deducted.

pex.label: PEX — Participation Exemption
pex.notes: 95% of capital gains on qualifying holdings exempt from IRES (D.P.R. 917/1986 art. 87).

ace.label: ACE — Aiuto alla Crescita Economica (abolished FY2024+)
ace.notes: ACE deduction repealed from FY2024 by D.L. 73/2023. Replaced by partial IRES reduction (IRES premiale) from 2026.

gestione_separata.notes: INPS Gestione Separata 26.72% for non-enrolled freelancers.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Entity type, local, provincial/state, surtax, relief, filing, withholding, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, municipal, provincial/state, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
